title: Songs of War RPG
description: The Songs of War modpack with RPG mode.
body:
# Songs of War RPG

This is a RPG modpack based on Songs of War Minecraft Animation.

## Credits

- Squared Media: Origin animation author and textures provider.

## Features

- Plenty of weapons and entities from the animation (Also can put on back&belt)
- Origins: 5 origin and occupations
- Magic system based on Wizard series
- Bounty system
- A lot of decorative objects
- Fully optimized
- Song Power Ability system.
- Cosplay gaming support: skin will change automatically when you wear heads in mod.

## Any questions?

Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/NDzz2upqAk)

## Override File Links

[Super Better Grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lambdabettergrass)

[Inventory Hud+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
